note: Official pdr.infotech.gov.ua and turbo-drive.od.ua both mark option 1 ('Зменшити швидкість, а в разі потреби зупинитися...') correct, per ПДР 17.4 (give way to route transport leaving a marked stop in a lay-by within a populated area). Our options match verbatim. Stored answer 3 is wrong; correct index = 1.
